# KODI PAP

> Automated rent collection management for landlords in Kenya. Track M-Pesa and bank payments, manage tenants and properties, and send statements and reminders.

KODI PAP helps Kenyan landlords collect rent the smart way: M-Pesa and bank payments are matched automatically to tenants, statements carry balances forward each month, and reminders go out via SMS.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and pricing for KODI PAP rent collection.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Create a landlord account or log in to manage your properties.
